caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture, likely focused on problem-solving or critical thinking. The main screen displays a black background with the text "What's the real problem?" written in green, suggesting that the speaker is addressing the importance of identifying the core issue before attempting to solve it. In the top right corner, there is a smaller inset showing a person wearing headphones and a cap, who seems to be the presenter. The individual is speaking, possibly elaborating on the concept of determining the true nature of a problem. The browser tabs and bookmarks visible at the top indicate that this might be part of an online session or webinar, with various resources related to systems thinking and community topics open in the background. The overall setting suggests an educational or professional context aimed at fostering analytical skills.
